title: hieracium lugdunense
intro: Hieracium lugdunense, also known as Hawkweed or Devil's paintbrush, is a flowering plant species belonging to the dandelion family (Asteraceae). It has been used in traditional herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, which include its ability to stimulate the immune system and reduce inflammation. The health benefits of Hieracium lugdunense include its potential to treat digestive issues, reduce fever, and alleviate symptoms of respiratory infections. The plant is often prepared as a tea or tincture, and its leaves and flowers can be used in herbal infusions or dried for later use.
